name: site-doctor
description: Complete production toolkit: audit, debug, and fix websites and databases. 26 skills spanning security (OWASP), SEO, performance, accessibility, API, observability, infrastructure, deployment, cost, backups, compliance, data migration, mobile, content, analytics, load testing, incident response, dependencies, email deliverability, and forms. PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite. Integrates two-way with the solo-team suite's .solo/ project memory when present: audits read project context and write their fix lists into tasks.md.
